CustomObject.description: Configurable risk score threshold values used by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer flow to classify litigation risk bands and trigger legal review tasks. Storing thresholds in custom metadata makes them auditable and updateable without a flow deployment. The Default record seeds the PermitTEC-calibrated thresholds (PNNL 2025, 761 cases).
CustomObject.label: NEPA Risk Threshold

fields.description: Minimum risk score for the VERY HIGH band. Scores at or above this value receive the Very High tier label and auto-create a legal review task. Default: 58 (PermitTEC calibration).
fields.label: Very High Floor

fields.description: Minimum risk score for the HIGH band. Scores at or above this value (and below Very_High_Floor__c) receive the High tier label. Default: 45 (PermitTEC calibration).
fields.label: High Floor

fields.description: Minimum risk score for the MODERATE band. Scores at or above this value (and below High_Floor__c) receive the Moderate tier label. Scores below this are Low. Default: 35 (PermitTEC calibration).
fields.label: Moderate Floor

fields.description: Minimum risk score that auto-creates a Legal Defensibility Review task. Intentionally equal to Very_High_Floor__c by default but configurable independently. Default: 58 (PermitTEC calibration).
fields.label: Legal Review Auto-Create Floor

fields.description: Only the active threshold record is queried by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer. Set exactly one record to Active = true.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Human-readable citation for the dataset used to calibrate these thresholds. Provides traceability for audit purposes.
fields.label: Calibration Source
